title: 美國參議員馬基：榮幸與代表香港民主未來的眾志成員會面，他們分享數以百萬個勇敢的香港人願意為他們的民主未來而冒險付出的故事

I was honored to meet w/ @Demosisto members representing democracy’s future in #HongKong. We agreed: free societies can be lost in far less time than it takes to build them. They shared stories of millions of brave Hongkongers willing to risk so much for their democracy’s future.
